name: Lemon Honey Spread
recipeInstructions:
Finely grated rind and the juice from 4 lemons (avoiding the bitter white pith), and strain the juice. 4 eggs.
Beat the eggs lightly. Combine all ingredients in a double boiler or a bowl set over hot water, cooking slowly until thickened. Check occasionally to ensure no water remains in the bottom pan. The mixture should be smooth and thick when ready. Pour into hot jars and seal tightly once cooled.
